category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gut as beginner friendly porcelain for git; source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gut; source_facts.homepage and repo identify the project as gut.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official gut-cli.dev site and best official documentation surface for the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/julien040/gut, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies git porcelain behavior; source_facts.executables lists gut.
